Off Calendar Apr-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Bruce Nye, Esq., from Adams/Nye/Trapani/Becht LLP, 415-982-8955, for Defendant and opposing party

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFFS FERNANDO CASTRO AND CYNTHIA DOMINGUEZ'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is DENIED.
Plaintiff has failed to sustain initial burden, specifically plaintiff has cited no authority to support the proposition that such de minimus non compliance violates ASFA. Order signed in open court. Judge: James J. McBride; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
